name: Linen Henley Pullover
notes: Off-palette. Cool blue clashes with DA warm coloring. Lounge or home only.

name: Curve Love HR 90s Relaxed Jean (medium let-down hem)
notes: Anchor with warm DA tops. Curve Love fit for higher hip-to-waist ratio.

name: HR Wide Leg Jean (dark)
notes: Best work denim. Clean hem + wide leg reads polished. Belted waist is a DA styling asset.

name: Frankie Double Zip Jeans
notes: Best DA-aligned work bottom. Washed black has warm undertones.

name: Sunday Mockneck Crew
notes: Cool pastel — home/lounge only. Clashes with DA warm coloring.

name: Sunday Mockneck Crew
notes: Strong DA color. Works as smart casual top.

name: Sunday Mockneck Crew
notes: Cool-leaning grey. Functional neutral but not DA-enhancing.

name: Sunday HR Baggy Sweatpants
notes: Home/lounge only. Off-palette for DA.

name: Sunday HR Wide Leg Sweatpant
notes: Yellow-green warmth makes this conditional. Pairs with camel or dark orange.

name: Sunday Hoodie
notes: Same warm sage. Wearable with warm DA anchors.

name: Sunday Hoodie
notes: DA grey is warmer than cool grey. Pair with warm DA pieces.

name: Sunday HR Baggy Sweatpants
notes: Casual/lounge. Better than sky blue but still conditional.

name: Denim Boxy Shirt (Half Sleeve)
notes: Warm natural ivory. Excellent DA neutral and crossover top.

name: Mini T-Shirt
notes: Best DA top in wardrobe. Anchor every neutral look with this.

name: Mini T-Shirt
notes: Cool blue — off-palette for DA. Wear sparingly.

name: Mini T-Shirt
notes: Cool-leaning grey. Functional but not DA-enhancing.

name: Mini T-Shirt
notes: Excellent DA color. Strong crossover top for work and casual.

name: Cotton Gathered Mini Dress (Printed)
notes: Cool pastel — clashes directly with DA warm coloring.

name: mofusand UT Graphic T-Shirt (Cropped)
notes: Novelty/fun piece. Wear for personality not palette.

name: Cotton Short Shirt (Printed)
notes: Warm ivory base. Good spring layering top.

name: Cotton Cocoon Skirt (Printed)
notes: Versatile cocoon silhouette. Warm ivory base works well.

name: Drapey Denim Skort
notes: Medium blue denim. Off-palette for DA. Casual wear only.

name: Mini Polo Shirt
notes: Crisp white is cool for DA. Best as a layering piece under DA outerwear.

name: Round Mini Shoulder Bag
notes: Exceptional DA accessory. Elevates every neutral outfit instantly.

name: Jersey Relaxed Jacket
notes: Off-palette. Consider replacing in olive or camel colorway.

name: Balloon Jeans (Greene Wash)
notes: Lighter wash than expected. Casual only — not work-appropriate.

name: Momjean Short (Willis Wash)
notes: Cool-toned wash. Summer casual only.

name: The Perfect Jean Short (Balsam Wash)
notes: Worn-in light blue. Summer casual only.

name: HR Denim Shorts (Danny Wash)
notes: Medium TENCEL blue. Slightly better than lighter washes but still cool-toned.

name: Boardwalk Post Slide Sandal
notes: First DA-ideal footwear. Warms every outfit including cool-toned denim.

name: Boatneck Button-Back Sweater Tee
notes: Excellent DA color. Boatneck + boxy crop is highly crossover-ready.

name: Halis Oversized Amelie T-Shirt
notes: Sandy warm white — better than bright white for DA. Good layering top.

name: West Long Sleeve Top
notes: Solid work and casual top. Anchors well with DA accessories.

name: Sabbath Boxy Embellished Graphic Tee
notes: Washed black reads warmer. Boxy fit works well casually.

name: Suki Leather Belt
notes: Functional belt. Warm brass hardware would push this to 8/10.

name: Align HR Short 6"
notes: Solid neutral. Pairs well under DA linen tops.

name: HR Pleated Tennis Skirt
notes: Best crossover active piece. Smart casual with a DA knit.

name: Lightweight HR Tennis Skirt
notes: Crossover with tucked-in camel or rust top.

name: Like a Cloud Ribbed Longline Bra
notes: Wears as a top under an open blazer or jacket.

name: Like a Cloud Longline Bra
notes: Same crossover logic as ribbed version.

name: Adapted State Textured Jacket
notes: Reflective texture elevates it. Wears over DA outfits for transitions.

name: It's Rulu Ribbed Cropped Half Zip
notes: Cropped cut limits crossover. Good layering piece.

name: It's Rulu Cropped Half Zip
notes: Near-duplicate of ribbed version. Consider diversifying.

name: UV-Protective Side Ruched Running Long Sleeve
notes: Excellent DA color. Wears easily as a casual top.

name: Wunder Train HR Tight 25"
notes: Strong DA color. Crossover with an oversized camel knit.

name: Wunder Train HR Short 6"
notes: Best warm-season DA active piece in wardrobe.

name: Bandana Towel — Paisley Green
notes: Warm olive-green. Great DA accessory for outdoor use.

name: Bandana Towel — Paisley Red
notes: Warm earthy red. Aligns well with DA palette.

name: Active Skin 4 Hydration Vest
notes: Functional gear. Neutral black works with anything.

name: Active Skin 4 Hydration Vest
notes: Muted olive-green. Excellent DA color.

name: Daily Speed Short
notes: Good active neutral.

name: Swift Dri-FIT UV Long-Sleeve Crewneck
notes: Crew neck limits crossover vs. a mock neck.

name: Circa Daily Boxy T-Shirt
notes: Boxy relaxed cut. Wears easily as a casual top with jeans.

name: Circa Daily Boxy T-Shirt
notes: Cream base is DA-friendly. Teal graphic limits full DA styling.

name: Swoosh Medium Support Bra
notes: White details add cool contrast. Keep for sport only.

name: Women's GT-2000 14
notes: Warm oatmeal tone is DA-adjacent. Pairs with casual DA looks.

name: Swift Repel Packable Novelty Jacket
notes: Packable utility. Works as an outer layer in casual contexts.

name: Oversized Button-Down Shirt
notes: Excellent DA color. Fills biggest work top gap — wear with dark denim or wide leg trousers.

name: Lace-Up Cropped Pullover (Endless Horizons)
notes: Conditional. Cool-leaning grey; pair with strong DA bottoms to ground the look.

name: Corduroy Shacket
notes: Warm dusty undertones. Good casual outerwear layer; pairs well with DA earth tones.

name: Chunky Turtleneck Sweater
notes: Conditional. Works with strong DA anchors like rust or camel. Avoid pairing with other cool tones.

name: Open-Knit Sleeveless Sweater
notes: Off-palette. Cool sage similar to ocean green Sunday pieces. Casual only.

name: Oversized Linen Shirt
notes: Bright white is cool for DA. Works best open as a layering piece over DA tops.

name: Geometric Print Crop Top
notes: Black base is ok; white geometric print adds cool contrast. Pair with warm DA bottoms.

name: Palmina Blouse
notes: Sleeveless macramé V-neck. Perfect DA mahogany rust. Pairs with dark denim (items 1–3) or wide-leg trousers. Layer under a blazer for Apple office wear.

name: Gabby Mesh Maxi Dress
notes: Mesh maxi, ruched front, warm floral print. 60% off ($239→$95). Strong DA statement piece for social occasions; maxi length limits direct work use.

name: Moab 3 Waterproof Hiking Shoe
notes: Warm walnut base with rust-salmon lace accents — both tones land well in the Deep Autumn palette. Vibram sole, waterproof. Great for trail days, weekend hikes, or casual outdoor errands. Pair with olive cargo pants, rust activewear, or warm brown leggings for a cohesive DA look. The earthy tones bridge active and casual contexts naturally.

name: Arizona Suede Sandal
notes: Core DA anchor shoe. Dark warm espresso suede with silver buckles. Pairs effortlessly with camel, olive, rust, and burgundy tones. Great for spring/summer casual and elevated-casual office days. A workhorse shoe for the DA wardrobe.

name: M2K Tekno Sneaker
notes: Warm cream/sand dad sneaker — reads as warm ivory rather than stark white, which keeps it DA-compatible. Best paired with other warm tones (camel, tan, olive, burgundy) rather than cool or bright colors. Good active-to-casual crossover shoe.

name: Air Peep-Toe Slingback Block Heel Pump D20137
color: Mustard Suede, Walnut Brown Leather, Hunter Green Patent
notes: Nike Air era c.2005-2012. Mustard suede body, walnut brown leather piping, hunter green patent block heel and square buckle. All three tones are core DA. Pairs with olive, camel, burgundy, dark denim. Apr-Sep.

name: Ines Single-Band Slide
notes: Wide single leather band with cutout double-T logo. Flat slide. Core DA camel neutral — pairs with virtually everything in a DA wardrobe. Well-worn, sole shows heavy use. Best for casual and smart-casual; not office-appropriate. Apr-Sep.

name: Amany Wingtip Brogue Heeled Oxford
notes: Lace-up brogue wingtip with stacked block heel ~2.5-3 inches. Cognac tan leather — core DA tone. Androgynous-chic silhouette. Pairs with dark olive trousers, straight-leg jeans, camel midi skirts, and tailored work separates. Great Fall/Winter/Spring work shoe. Not a summer shoe.

name: Narrative Wingtip Brogue Flat Oxford
notes: Flat lace-up brogue wingtip. Cognac tan leather — core DA neutral. Clarks Narrative premium leather line. Well-worn; leather shows scuffing on toe, would benefit from conditioning. Flat counterpart to Refresh Amany heeled brogue (#138). Pairs with dark olive trousers, straight-leg jeans, tailored separates. Fall/Winter/Spring.

name: Day Glove Flat
notes: Minimalist rounded-toe glove flat, pebbled leather, pull tab, warm nude camel. Stored with shoe tree — well cared for. Nude is borderline DA (sandy/warm nudes are conditional), but works as a leg-lengthening neutral. Pairs best with DA earth tones rather than bright colors. Year-round except winter.

name: Day Loafer
notes: Flat penny loafer, dark espresso brown leather, ruched/gathered back collar. Well-worn with surface marks on toe — could benefit from leather conditioning. Dark brown is a core DA neutral. Extremely versatile work and smart-casual shoe. Pairs with olive, burgundy, camel, rust.

name: Pointed-Toe Slipper Flat
notes: Minimalist pointed-toe slipper flat, high vamp, no hardware. Warm nude sand leather. Conditional DA — works best when outfit is anchored in richer DA tones above. Third nude/camel flat in wardrobe alongside Everlane Day Glove (#140) and Tory Burch Ines (#137) — overlapping territory. Spring/Summer/Fall.

name: Smoking Slipper Flat
notes: Flat pointed-toe smoking slipper, walnut brown faux leather, woven/jute-trimmed outsole edge. Richer deeper brown than the cognac brogues — useful tonal variety. Smart-casual to casual; too relaxed for formal office. Pairs with dark olive, camel, rust, burgundy separates. Best spring/fall — woven sole not ideal for winter.

name: Z/2 Classic Sport Sandal
color: Tan Khaki Webbing with Rust Accent Pattern
notes: Double toe strap Z/2 Classic, Made in USA. Tan/khaki webbing with subtle rust/orange accent pattern — earthy DA tones. Black lugged rubber sole. First active shoe in wardrobe; key active-to-casual crossover piece. Pairs with linen shorts, casual trousers, athletic wear. Not office-appropriate but excellent for travel days, hiking, and casual weekends. Spring/Summer/Fall.

name: Farah Chelsea Ankle Boot
notes: Australian brand, purchased in Australia. Round toe, low block heel, elastic side panel, leather pull tab. Black is off-palette for DA but essential fall/winter work boot. Pair with burgundy, olive, camel or rust to keep outfits DA-anchored rather than all-black. High versatility for work and smart-casual. Fall/Winter/Spring.

name: 1460 Pascal Lace-Up Boot
color: Black Soft Leather with Yellow Welt Stitching
notes: 8-eye lace-up, soft pebbled leather (likely Virginia/Nappa), yellow welt stitching, air-cushioned sole. Black is off-palette for DA but yellow stitching adds warm accent. Strong character piece — pairs well with straight-leg jeans, midi skirts, olive or burgundy trousers. More casual than the Windsor Smith Chelsea; can push into smart-casual at Apple. Fall/Winter/Spring.
